title: hedyotis arenaria
intro: Hedyotis arenaria, also known as creeping dogbane or Chinese creeping thyme, is a flowering plant native to Asia and Europe. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Hedyotis arenaria include its ability to alleviate fever, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. Hedyotis arenaria can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or extract, and is often used in conjunction with other herbs to promote overall well-being.
